title: Granules India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Granules India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!
